ocr_findings.description: OCR omits the page number '142' footer that appears in the image; minor omission with no content impact.

reviewer_notes: This page is the 解答・解説 (answer + explanation) section for problems 4-1 through 4-5. It contains detailed explanatory paragraphs for each answer, not exam questions with ア/イ/ウ/エ choices to be answered. Although it references answer letters (ウ, エ, ア), the page is a solution-explanation page and fits 'content' better than 'exam'. All OCR text matches image faithfully.
